title: Traditional Slovak Trdelník Pudding Pancakes
description: A unique dessert inspired by Slovakian traditions, combining fluffy pancakes with a rich trdelník pudding.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and a pinch of salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together milk, eggs, sour cream, and melted butter.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and whisk until smooth.
Add vanilla extract and mix well.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Transfer the pancakes to a wire rack to cool slightly.
Prepare the trdelník pudding according to the package instructions.
To assemble, place a pancake on a serving plate, top with a spoonful of pudding, and dust with confectioners' sugar.
